hero_desc: Paved roads, modern agriculture, and tap water for all. Under Shri Ramnath Ji's leadership, every ward is connecting to a digital identity.
sec_gallery_sub: Festivals, people, and progress of our village
sec_services_sub: Access your documents without visiting the Panchayat Bhawan
farm_sub: Crop Insurance, PM-Kisan Nidhi, and Soil Health Cards
panch_sub: Income, Caste, Domicile Certificates & Family Register Copies
infra_sub: MNREGA Job Cards, PM Awas Yojana List & Road Construction Updates
edu_sub: Ayushman Card, Vaccination Schedule & Primary School Admissions
news1_title: Special Gram Sabha for Kharif Crop Planning
news1_desc: A discussion on fertilizer and seed distribution will be held on July 15 at Panchayat Bhawan. All ward members must attend.
news2_title: CC Road Tender Passed in Ward No 4
news2_desc: Construction of a concrete road in the main lane of Ward 4 will begin before the monsoons.
footer_sub: Call directly for any issues related to drainage, sanitation, or rations.
slider_sub: Suryapura Village | A Glimpse of Our Progress
slider_desc: Glimpses of development work by Suryapura Gram Panchayat. Visual record of progress in our village over the years.
slider_desc_en: सूर्यपुरा ग्राम पंचायत की ओर से विकास की झलकियां। पिछले वर्षों में हमारे गाँव में हुए विकास कार्यों का विज़ुअल रिकॉर्ड।
schemes_desc: All schemes information of Suryapura Gram Panchayat. Farmers, education, roads, health and digital services in one portal.
schemes_desc_en: सूर्यपुरा ग्राम पंचायत की सभी योजनाओं की जानकारी। किसान, शिक्षा, सड़क, स्वास्थ्य और डिजिटल सेवाओं का एक ही पोर्टल।
